services.online-description-note: * Online description : Description for service showed on online bookings.
services.online-description-note2: * Service Detail : Service detail information showed on online bookings.
services.every-resources-can-perform-this-service: Every booking resources can perform this service
services.choose-resources-can-perform-this-servic: Choose resource can perform this service
services.guide-content:
Processing Time

This is the time during which the service does not require staff work.(E.g., the time between pre-treatment and finishing during perm or coloring.)
For the processing time, the staff can accept other bookings.

Finishing Time

This is the time required to complete the service after processing.


※ Total estimated timeof the service = Estimated time + Processing Time + Finishing Time.
services.service-category-inactive-status-warning: Do you want to inactivate all services in this category as well?
services.salary-amount-mismatch-error: When 'Amount' is selected, Salary(Sales) and Salary(Deduction) must be the same.

prepaid-services.revenue-per-service-tooltip: Revenue per Service is the amount applied to calculate deduction sales or staff salaries
prepaid-services.warning-different-price:
Unit price * Quantity different from Sales price. Do you want Save?

(Unit price is used to calculate deduction sales)
prepaid-services.salary-sales-description: If you set ‘Amount’, the amount will be calculated as salary regardless of the staff sales amount.

branch-sales.title: Branch Sales
branch-sales.note-1: * Revenue Total = Service Total + Product Total
branch-sales.note-2: * Sales Total = Service Sales + Product Sales + Prepaid Goods Sales
branch-sales.note-4: * You only can see the branches allowed to see branch sales. (You can set in 'Setup – Environment Setup - Data Protection' after logging in to the branch).
branch-sales.note-5: * Printing is applied on per-page basis.
branch-sales.total-of-records: A total of {sumItems} out of {items} branches are displayed.

branch-prepaid-goods.title: Branch Prepaid Goods
branch-prepaid-goods.note-1: * Remaining Amount for Prepaid Services = Remaining Quantity * Revenue per Service
branch-prepaid-goods.note-2: * The balance on Discount Card = Sales Amount x (Remaining period / Total available period)
branch-prepaid-goods.note-3: * Remaining Amount for Unlimited Qty Prepaid Services = Sales Amount x (Remaining period / Total available period)

sales-by-date.title: Sales by Date
sales-by-date.tooltip-prepaid-sales-counting:
Option to select whether to count prepaid goods sales based on the point of sale or point of used.
- When sold : Service, Product, Prepaid Goods Sales are counted. (Prepaid Goods Deductions are excluded.)
- When used : Sales and Deductions of Service/Product are counted. (Prepaid Goods Sales are excluded.)

sales-by-month.title: Sales by Month
sales-by-month.tooltip-prepaid-sales-counting:
Option to select whether to count prepaid goods sales based on the point of sale or point of used.
- When sold : Service, Product, Prepaid Goods Sales are counted. (Prepaid Goods Deductions are excluded.)
- When used : Sales and Deductions of Service/Product are counted. (Prepaid Goods Sales are excluded.)

service-sales.title: Service Sales
service-sales.note-1: * Only service sales(including prepaid goods deductions) are counted.

input-date-range.end-date-can-not-before-start-date: End date must be later than the start date.
input-date-range.error_date_range_within_last_year: Date is only available within the last year.

service-sales-by-item.title: Service Sales by Item
service-sales-by-item.note-1: * Only service sales(including prepaid goods deductions) are counted.

service-sales-by-month.title: Service Sales by Month
service-sales-by-month.note-1: * Only service sales(including prepaid goods deductions) are counted.

service-sales-by-sales-type.title: Service Sales by Sales Type
service-sales-by-sales-type.tooltip-prepaid-sales-counting:
Option to select whether to count prepaid goods sales based on the point of sale or point of used.
- When sold : Service Sales, Prepaid Goods Sales are counted. (Prepaid Goods Deductions are excluded.)
- When used : Sales and Deductions of Service are counted. (Prepaid Goods Sales are excluded.)
service-sales-by-sales-type.note-1: * Only service sales(including prepaid goods deductions) are counted.

product-sales-by-item.title: Product Sales by Item
product-sales-by-item.note-1: * Only product sales(including prepaid cards deductions) are counted.

product-sales-by-month.title: Product Sales by Month
product-sales-by-month.note-1: * Only product sales(including prepaid cards deductions) are counted.

clients-by-period.title: Clients by Period
clients-by-period.note-1: * Visiting Clients: The number of clients with sales for the inquiry period.
clients-by-period.note-2: * Visiting Members: The number of clients with prepaid goods sales or deduction among the visiting clients.
clients-by-period.note-3-sub-1: - The count is based on unique clients, regardless of the number of visits. (e.g., if Jhon visits twice within the selected period, the client count remains as one.)
clients-by-period.note-3-sub-2: - Even if a new client revisits within the selected period, they are counted only in the new client count.

clients-summary.title: Clients Summary
clients-summary.label-dormant-client-criteria: Dormant Client Criteria: No visit in
clients-summary.label-note-member: * Member : Clients who have valid prepaid goods and are not dormant.
clients-summary.label-note-non-member: * Non Member : Clients who do not have valid prepaid goods and are not dormant. (Including expired members.)

if-you-have-any-question-while-using-aha.first: If you have any questions while using AhaSoft Plus,
if-you-have-any-question-while-using-aha.second: please callor chat with our customer service team.

help-center.sundays-and-holidays-leave-the-message: On Sundays and holidays, please leave a message in chat and we will respond to you during our business hours.

new-clients-repeat.title: New Clients Repeat
new-clients-repeat.note-1: * New clients are counted based on the first visit date of the client.
new-clients-repeat.note-2: * The number of repeat clients includes only the first revisit. (For example, if a new client revisits in Feb and March, it will only be included in February)
new-clients-repeat.note-3: * If the staff is changed when the client revisits, it is counted as the repeat of the first sales staff.
new-clients-repeat.note-4: * If a client’s first sales has more than one staff, it is counted as a new clients of multi-staffs.
